notes: Primary OCR Markdown contains the core household FOCs, production function, aggregate Phillips curve, IS curve, money-demand equations, Taylor rule, quantity equation, and shock processes.
No PDF body was opened; raw PDF existence was checked only for provenance.
Coefficient formulas for the flexible-price output block and Phillips-curve slopes should be source-level checked before review promotion.
Implementation cross-check confirms model(linear), variable names, shock names, and the productive-money Taylor-rule variant, but was not treated as paper-side mathematical evidence.

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only.

copyright_boundary: The derivation summarizes model structure and equations. It does not copy long prose from the paper or appendix.
